description_long: This object consists of three distinct shrubs, each with a dense arrangement of fine, needle-like leaves that radiate outward from a central stem. The foliage is predominantly a mix of light and dark green hues, giving a natural, vibrant appearance. The shrubs vary in size, with one being notably taller and more conical, while the other two are shorter and more rounded. All three are rooted in small, dark circular bases, suggesting they are potted or designed for easy placement. The texture of the leaves appears soft and feathery, with a slight translucency at the tips. The overall grouping suggests a decorative use, suitable for urban landscaping or ornamental planting.
description: A group of three potted shrubs with dense, needle-like green foliage and dark circular bases, varying in height and shape. The arrangement is visually lush and natural, ideal for decorative urban settings.
description_view_0: Three shrubs are visible, with the tallest shrub in the center and the two shorter, rounder shrubs flanking it, all showing dense green foliage.
description_view_1: The tallest shrub is now on the right, with the two smaller shrubs closer together on the left, highlighting the conical shape of the largest shrub.
description_view_2: The tallest shrub is in the center, with the two smaller shrubs on either side, emphasizing the height difference and the rounded forms of the smaller shrubs.
description_view_3: The tallest shrub is on the left, with the two smaller shrubs to the right, showing the layered arrangement and the feathery texture of the foliage.
